run_summary.summary: Gmail scan failed — OAuth token has been expired or revoked. No emails were scanned this run. To restore scanning, re-authorize the Gmail connection and update the refresh token in the Brandi agent config.

suggestions.message: Gmail OAuth token is expired/revoked. Re-authorize at https://accounts.google.com or check the refresh token in the agent's curl command. Until this is fixed, Brandi cannot scan for new deals or thread updates.
